languages.text: При всем уважении, мы заняты и пытаемся спасти Вивисектора!

traits.locale_text: При всем уважении, мы заняты и пытаемся спасти Вивисектора!

languages.text: "При всем уважении к Вашей Светлости, покиньте зону операции! Вивисектор Мартинакс в критическом состоянии, на светские беседы нет времени!"
"With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"
languages.original_text: "При всем уважении к Вашей Светлости, покиньте зону операции! Вивисектор Мартинакс в критическом состоянии, на светские беседы нет времени!"

traits.locale_text: "With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"
"With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"
"With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"

languages.text: 「御{mf|殿|女}の御心に従いましょう。手術区域は離れてください。解剖師マーティナックスは重傷です。礼儀正しさで時間をかける余裕はありません！」
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'ne saygısızlık etmek istemem ancak ameliyathaneyi terk etmelisiniz! Dirikesimci Martinax'ın durumu kritik, nazik sohbetlere ayıracak vakit yok!"
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'ne saygısızlık etmek istemem ancak ameliyathaneyi terk etmelisiniz! Dirikesimci Martinax'ın durumu kritik, nazik sohbetlere ayıracak vakit yok!"

languages.text: “舰长大人，恕我冒昧，恳请您离开手术区！解剖者马丁纳克斯情况危急，现在不是客套的时候！”
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，恕我冒昧，恳请您离开手术区！解剖者马丁纳克斯情况危急，现在不是客套的时候！”

languages.text: "Bei allem Respekt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, bitte verlasst den Operationsbereich! Der Zustand von Vivisektor Martinax ist kritisch. Wir haben keine Zeit für den Austausch von Höflichkeiten!"
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"

traits.locale_text: "Bei allem Respekt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, bitte verlasst den Operationsbereich! Der Zustand von Vivisektor Martinax ist kritisch. Wir haben keine Zeit für den Austausch von Höflichkeiten!"

languages.text: « Avec tout le respect que je vous dois, Votre Seigneurie, vous n'avez rien à faire dans la zone d'opération ! Le vivisecteur Martinax est dans un état critique, nous n'avons pas le temps pour les politesses ! »
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"

traits.locale_text: « Avec tout le respect que je vous dois, Votre Seigneurie, vous n'avez rien à faire dans la zone d'opération ! Le vivisecteur Martinax est dans un état critique, nous n'avons pas le temps pour les politesses ! »

languages.text: «Con el debido respeto, mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¡salga de la zona de operación! El vivisector Martinax está en estado crítico, ¡no es momento para conversar!».
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, leave the operation area! Vivisector Martinax is in critical condition, there is no time for polite chitchat!"

traits.locale_text: «Con el debido respeto, mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¡salga de la zona de operación! El vivisector Martinax está en estado crítico, ¡no es momento para conversar!».
